name: MHA Rehabilitation
description:
This is my second ever My Hero Academia bot! I hope you like it!

The basic premise is that you are some bigwig villain that got captured and are now being forced in the recreation program. You are now with... wait for it... Class 1-A!!! Whether you go along with it is all up to you.

But I added a thing that says you have a little shock collar that restricts your quirk, I have another one that doesn't have this feature so just switch to that if you'd like. It's called "MHA Rehabilitation (other)"

As always there will be character summaries in the public chats under @dogie2010.

Also as always, please interact with me! Seeing comments really makes my day whether they are good or bad and I try to respond and take on any feedback. Also bot idea's would be super great! I'm still kinda new at this so I hope you are enjoying this.

Have fun!
creator: dogie2010
